headline: Salesforce TTEC Digital Partnership Puts Agentforce Production Use In Focus
summary: TTEC Digital joined Salesforce's new Forward Deployed Engineering Partner Network. The partnership focuses on scaling Salesforce's Agentforce and AI agent deployments into production environments. The move is intended to support secure, integrated customer experience solutions at enterprise scale. For investors watching Salesforce (NYSE:CRM), this development sits at the intersection of AI, customer experience, and large scale enterprise software. Agentforce is part of Salesforce's push to...
